steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content:
Start with the model and subtract $332.5$ from both sides.
$$v=332.5+0.607T$$
$$v-332.5=0.607T$$

steps.title: Divide by the coefficient
steps.content:
Now divide both sides by $0.607$ to solve for $T$.
$$T=\frac{v-332.5}{0.607}$$
The answer is D.
